description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: National Day Special Traffic and Transport Arrangements
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 國慶日特別交通及運輸安排

2024-09-30T12:29:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the celebration events of National Day, water taxi services will not ply Wan Chai from the first sailing on 30 September to 1 pm on 1 October.
2024-09-30T12:29:00.CONTENT_CN: 為配合國慶活動，⽔上的⼠服務將由9月30日首班船起至10月1日下午1時正不停靠灣仔。

2024-10-01T13:27:00.CONTENT_EN: Water taxi services have resumed to berth at Wan Chai.

2024-10-01T19:34:00.CONTENT_EN: Lantau Link: Due to strong wind, the following temporary traffic measure is implemented on Lantau Link: The speed limit of Lantau Link is reduced to 50km/h. Members of the public are advised to watch out for the latest traffic news through radio and television broadcasts, and for the traffic signs on site.
2024-10-01T19:34:00.CONTENT_CN: 青嶼幹線： 由於強風關係，青嶼幹線已實施下列臨時交通措施： 青嶼幹線的車速限制降至每小時50 公里。 市民請留意電台/電視廣播的最新交通消息，以及現場的交通標誌。

2024-10-01T22:30:00.CONTENT_EN: Lantau Link: The Middle lane closure and temporary speed limit arrangements which were implemented before in the Lantau Link are cancelled. Ting Kau Bridge: The temporary speed limit arrangement which was implemented before in the Ting Kau Bridge is cancelled. Members of the public are advised to watch out for the latest traffic news through radio and television broadcasts, and for the traffic signs on site.
2024-10-01T22:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 青嶼幹線： 較早前於青嶼幹線實施的中線封閉及臨時車速限制措施現已取消。 汀九橋： 較早前於汀九橋實施的臨時車速限制措施現已取消。 市民請留意電台/電視廣播的最新交通消息，以及現場的交通標誌。

2024-10-02T08:09:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident, part of the lanes of the junction of Kwun Tong Road (Yau Tong bound) and Elegance Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-02T08:09:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，觀塘道(往油塘方向)與雅麗道的交界的部份行車線現已封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-02T08:12:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of the junction of Kwun Tong Road (Yau Tong bound) and Elegance Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-10-02T08:12:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外⽽封閉的觀塘道(往油塘方向)與雅麗道的交界的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-10-02T08:17:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Po Shek Wu Road (Man Kam To bound) near Po Wan Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-02T08:17:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，寶石湖路(往文錦渡方向)近寶運路的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-02T09:07:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Po Shek Wu Road (Man Kam To bound) near Po Wan Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2024-10-02T09:07:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的寶石湖路(往文錦渡方向)近寶運路的部份行車線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。

2024-10-02T08:21:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Ching Tak Street is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2024-10-02T08:47:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Ching Tak Street which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.

2024-10-02T08:27:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Tsing Lung Tau is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-02T08:27:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，屯門公路(往九龍方向)近青龍頭的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-02T08:40:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Tsing Lung Tau which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-10-02T08:40:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的屯門公路(往九龍方向)近青龍頭的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-10-02T08:55:00.CONTENT_EN: Lion Rock Tunnel Road (Kowloon bound) is busy. Motorists passing through the above road section(s) are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
2024-10-02T08:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 獅子山隧道公路(往九龍方向)的交通繁忙。 駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。

2024-10-02T09:43:00.CONTENT_EN: Traffic at Lion Rock Tunnel Road (Kowloon bound) has resumed normal.
2024-10-02T09:43:00.CONTENT_CN: 獅子山隧道公路(往九龍方向)的交通現已恢復正常。

2024-10-02T09:04:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Wai Yip Street (Yau Tong bound) near King Yip Street which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-10-02T09:04:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的偉業街(往油塘方向)近敬業街的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-10-02T09:14:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Tuen Mun bound) near Siu Lam Road is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queue on Tuen Mun Road (Tuen Mun bound) ends at Tuen Mun Road near Hong Kong Garden. Traffic is congested now.
2024-10-02T09:14:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，屯門公路(往屯門方向)近小欖路的部份行車線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時在屯門公路(往屯門方向)的車龍龍尾已到屯門公路近豪景花園。 現時上址交通擠塞。

2024-10-02T09:31:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Tuen Mun bound) near Siu Lam Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2024-10-02T09:31:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的屯門公路(往屯門方向)近小欖路的部份行車線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。

2024-10-02T09:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Fanling Highway (Sheung Shui bound) near Wo Hop Shek is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-02T09:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，粉嶺公路(往上水方向)近和合石的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-02T10:07:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Fanling Highway (Sheung Shui bound) near Wo Hop Shek which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.

2024-10-02T09:51:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Tuen Mun bound) near Sham Tseng Interchange is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-02T09:51:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，屯門公路(往屯門方向)近深井交匯處的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-02T09:59:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Siu Sai Wan Road (Fullview Garden bound) near Hiu Tsui Street are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-02T09:59:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，小西灣道(往富景花園方向)近曉翠街的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-02T10:14:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , all lanes of the section of Siu Sai Wan Road (Fullview Garden bound) between Sun Yip Street and Harmony Road is closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-02T10:14:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，小西灣道(往富景花園方向)介乎新業街與富欣道之間的一段全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-02T10:21:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Siu Sai Wan Road (Fullview Garden bound) near Hiu Tsui Street is closed to all traffic. 
Below affected Citybus bus routes have to be diverted:

Siu Sai Wan (Island Resort) bound: 106, 106P, 118, 118P, 606, 606X, 788, 789, 82, 82S, 82X, 85, 85P, 88X, 8H, 8P, 8S, 8X, 976A, A12, X8

Chai Wan (East) bound: 682

Siu Sai Wan Estate bound: 694, 694S.  Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-02T10:21:00.CONTENT_CN:
因水管爆裂，小西灣道(往富景花園方向)近曉翠街的全線現已封閉。

往小西灣邨方向：694、694S。  駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  現時上址交通繁忙。
